Carlos Mendoza
Hotel Operations Manager, New York, NY
carlos.mendoza@example.com | 555-201-3010 | linkedin.com/in/carlos-mendoza-hotel

SUMMARY
Hospitality professional with 10 years in hotel operations and guest services at
large full-service properties. Front office and food & beverage leadership with a
focus on guest satisfaction, occupancy, and revenue management.

EXPERIENCE
Hotel Operations Manager — Grand Harbor Hotel (2019–present)
- Oversee front office, housekeeping, and food & beverage operations for a
  600-room Midtown hotel, managing a team of 90 across departments.
- Drive guest satisfaction scores up 18 points through service-recovery training
  and revamped check-in/concierge workflows on the Opera PMS.
- Partner with revenue management on occupancy, rate, and reservations strategy
  during peak tourism seasons and conventions.

Front Office Manager — City Center Inn (2014–2019)
- Managed front desk, reservations, and guest services; led banquet and event
  coordination for weddings and corporate functions.

SKILLS
Hospitality, hotel operations, guest services, front office, food and beverage,
guest satisfaction, occupancy, revenue management, Opera PMS, reservations,
banquets, events, housekeeping, concierge, customer service

EDUCATION
B.S. Hospitality Management, Cornell University (SHA), 2014
